texto: Ty, my boy, here's what you tell them. Say it quietly, and sincerely, and like it's the most important thing anyone ever uttered. Tell them, 'Jesus loves you. But I'm his favorite.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Robin Reardon: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. O trecho “Ty, my boy, here's what you tell them. Say it quietly, and sincerely, and like it's the most impo…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, religious, quietly pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.

texto: I get the concept, all right -- like, why would God make me gay and then tell me it's a sin to be gay? But the freethinkers were confusing me. ' I don't get it. They have no religion, but they sort of believe in God, but they don't believe in faith?
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Robin Reardon: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “I get the concept, all right -- like, why would God make me gay and then tell me it's a sin to be…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que fe, belief-in-god, sexuality pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de sexuality.
